Issues: The image, while aesthetically pleasing, lacks a specific commercial niche or unique stylistic hook that would guarantee broad sales.
The resolution and detail level appear moderate; for high-quality print sales, higher resolution and more refined texture work would be required.
The composition is somewhat confined by the foreground framing, which may limit its appeal for large format posters or broad digital licensing.
The artistic style, while appealing, is highly derivative of common digital illustration trends, reducing its perceived originality in a saturated market.
